Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 194 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 33 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Mamba-3 262 upvotes, 50 comments
  4. The seven hour explosion nobody could explain 50 upvotes, 6 comments
  5. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 57 upvotes, 8 comments
  6. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 28 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 449 upvotes, 127 comments
  8. Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 108 upvotes, 29 comments
  10. Some things just take time 383 upvotes, 131 comments
  11. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 141 upvotes, 45 comments
  12. Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control 51 upvotes, 13 comments
  13. Molly guard in reverse 199 upvotes, 80 comments
  14. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 1169 upvotes, 574 comments
  15. Tinybox- offline AI device 120B parameters 119 upvotes, 66 comments
  16. Hawaii's worst flooding in 20 years threatens dam, prompts evacuations 19 upvotes, 6 comments
  17. Common Lisp Development Tooling 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. No evidence cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD 49 upvotes, 26 comments
  19. Books of the Century by Le Monde 76 upvotes, 45 comments
  20. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 60 upvotes, 35 comments
  21. 404 Deno CEO not found 225 upvotes, 163 comments
  22. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 435 upvotes, 340 comments
  23. No Semicolons Needed 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 101 upvotes, 72 comments
  25. Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel 24 upvotes, 14 comments
  26. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 259 upvotes, 284 comments
  27. Mayor of Paris removed parking spaces, reduced the number of cars 206 upvotes, 294 comments
  28. A pig's brain has been frozen with its cellular activity locked in place 79 upvotes, 115 comments
  29. Western carmakers' retreat from electric risks dooming them to irrelevance 133 upvotes, 243 comments
  30. The paddle wheel aircraft carriers of Lake Michigan 3 upvotes, 1 comments

Last generated 5:30am, 22 March 2026. Source here.
